From the discussion on Brihat Jataka sloka 'aii'.Plcl$"iji9:@a1'
itself we know that, Navamsa-Dwadasamsa can also be used
for BT rectification. The statement of Mihira that 'From the
Moon sign at the time of conception, when Moon reaches the
Navamsa-Dwadasamsa sign in natal chart due to transit (in
lOth month of pregnancy), in the equivalent day or night the
birth will take place' is also not without an Rishi hora
foundation. Mihira provides this statement based on the
following Brihat Prajapatya statement.
